description: Mailjet is an email delivery and marketing platform that provides APIs for sending email, managing contacts and campaigns, retrieving statistics, and sending SMS messages. It also offers an open-source MCP server that lets AI assistants read Mailjet account data through the Mailjet APIs.
summary: Mailjet exposes two authenticated REST APIs—Email API and SMS API—and a local stdio MCP server package for AI assistants that uses Mailjet API credentials; no public GraphQL API or standalone CLI was found.
